title: 🦇 Better BATS 🦇
description:
Pixel-Consistent? Yes.. at least should be.
Pretty? well, theyre really cute.
Better? maybe, why dont you try out?
body:
![title card](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7eb05b1538b8ba9e036afe09f743a0c7cfb8efbd.png)

# **Better Bats give bats a whole new visual which makes them pixel consistent but still keep the vanilla feeling**

![Bat Versions](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/UNHkiJ09/images/13350d874946f535488f1385b1a0bc5bd4aba0ae.png)



• Brown and Black bat variants

• Reddish Bats (white, gray and black with red details)

• Vampire bats and 'Magical' bats

• Some pokemon bats as well

**Requires: [OPTIFINE](optifine.net/downloads 'Download Here') or [ETF](https://modrinth.com/mod/entitytexturefeatures)+[EMF](modrinth.com/mod/entity-model-features)  mods**

<details>
<summary>More Info</summary>

To make sure the pack is working, you will not only need the mods, but also specific options turned on, with EMF/ETF theyre already on by default, but with optifine, not always check if both CustomEntityModels and RandomEntities are turned on

Options > Video Settings > Quality >
Custom Entity Models ON & Random Entities ON
</details>

<details>
<summary>BAT WIKI</summary>
You can use a nametag and add the "Namecode" anywhere in their names to get custom variants

|TYPE               |Natural Spawns                                           |Namecode|
|---------------------|:--------------------------------:|---------------:|
|Brown              |Common - rarer below Y 0                      |Unavailable ❌|
|Black                |Common - more common below Y 0     |Unavailable ❌|
|Gray                 |Common - more common below Y 0     |Unavailable ❌|
|Red                   |Uncommon - common below Y0  |Red / rv(random chance)✅|
|White Vampire|Rare - more common below Y0              |Vampire / vb (random chance)✅|
|Black Vampire|Rare - more common below Y0               |Vampire / vb (random chance)✅|
|Zubat               |Extremely Rare - less rarer below Y0      |Zubat ✅|
|Noibat              |Extremely Rare - less rarer below Y0      |Noibat /Onbat✅|
|Swoobat          |Extremely Rare - less rarer below Y0      |Swoobat/Kokoromori✅|
|Pokemons(all)|Extremely Rare - less rarer below Y0      |Pokemon / Poke / pk (random chance)✅|
|Crystal Bat   |Extremely Rare - less rarer below Y0      |Dark / Crystal✅|
|Skeleton Bat   |Extremely Rare - less rarer below Y0      |Dead / Zombie / Skeleton / sk ✅|
</details>
